message:
Implement comprehensive jfp help command

- Create help.ts with organized command categories (listing, viewing, copying, installing, bundles, registry, utilities)
- Add JSON output schema for agent integrations
- Include usage examples with descriptions
- Add pager support for long output (auto-detects less)
- Add documentation links and agent integration tips
- Include help command tests with golden schema validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
